beefs.title: Backrooms (film)
beefs.about: + So, the one being annoying and disruptive here is you; you’re using TikTok—which isn't a reliable source—to claim that only that specific poster is the final one, when you could simply check the official Backrooms account and see that the Reinsve version is one too. Using a video of a person as a source is incredibly lame. And since you like TikTok so much, other cinemas also use the Reinsve poster and one uploaded previously: https://vm.tiktok.com/ZN81byHk5/ and https://vm.tiktok.com...
quotes: + So, the one being annoying and disruptive here is you; you’re using TikTok—which isn't a reliable source—to claim that only that specific poster is the final one, when you could simply check the official Backrooms account and see that the Reinsve version is one too. Using a video of a person as a source is incredibly lame. And since you like TikTok so much, other cinemas also use the Reinsve poster and one uploaded previously: https://vm.tiktok.com/ZN81byHk5/ and https://vm.tiktok.com...

Reverted 1 edit by Adulitanum (talk): What makes you think it's not the other way around? TikTok is not a reliable source, and it's entirely possible the theatre was displaying a variation of the poster. Your edits are WP:OR.

Who said anything about reddit? The response is a video published 05-28-26 opening night showing the poster is the theatrical version. Do you have proof that the theater got it wrong and displayed an unofficial poster?
